name: Prize Winning Ham and Lentil Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cup Dried lentils, rinsed and sorted
1 can Tomatoes (28 oz.) with liquid, cut up
12 oz Bulk pork sausage, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, bring ham bone and water to a boil.
2. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 1 1/2 hours.
3. Remove ham bone from the pot.
4. To the broth, add lentils, tomatoes, carrots, celery, onions, and seasonings.
5. Bring to a boil and reduce heat.
6. Cover and simmer for 30-40 minutes or until lentils and vegetables are tender.
7. Meanwhile, remove ham from the bone and coarsely chop it.
8. Add the chopped ham, sausage, and parsley to the soup.
9. Heat through.
